summary:
TACTICAL GUIDANCE
Objective: Re-establish vision – both bots sweep forward in 30° offset wedges until enemy detected.
Threat: Blind & ammo-dry; any contact is high threat.
Focus: First red robot that appears – both bo...

TACTICAL GUIDANCE
Objective: Re-acquire vision – continue 30° wedge sweep, max 15 m forward.
Threat: Still blind & ammo-dry; assume instant lethal contact.
Focus: First red signature – both bots snap-engage with bump/...

TACTICAL GUIDANCE
Objective: Re-acquire – continue 30° wedge sweep, 15 m max.
Threat: Blind & ammo-dry; treat any contact as lethal.
Focus: First red signature – both bots instant bump-rush.
Fallback: If contact lost ...

主目标：继续30°楔形前扫，15 m内重夺视野。
威胁：全盲零弹，任何接触即致命。
优先集火：首个出现的红方目标——双车同步撞击+贴脸开火。
保命/撤退：若任一车被击中或失连，立即后撤至起点掩体。

主目标：保持30°楔形前扫，15 m内重夺视野。

主目标：保持30°楔形前扫，15 m内重夺视野。
威胁：全盲零弹，接触即死。
